The deuterium target was gaseous; the lithium,
beryllium, and carbon targets were solid. Lithium and
carbon were natural isotopic mixtures. All target
materials had a chemical purity higher than 98%.

by electrost.tandem accelerator and to high energies by
a cyclotron injecting negative 8-MeV deuterium ions
